nodes.summary: Alarm screen showing a list of configured alarms, a floating action button to add a new alarm, and a bottom navigation bar.
More options menu containing application-wide settings and links.
Settings screen with sections for Clock and Alarms settings. Includes options for clock style, seconds display, home clock, silence period, and snooze length.
Selection menu for Clock Style with options for Analog and Digital.
Settings More options menu appearing as a popup over the Settings screen, containing links for feedback and help.
Silence after dialog with options for 1, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25 minutes or Never, and a Cancel button.
Snooze length dialog with radio button options for duration in minutes and a Cancel button.
Expanded view of an alarm item on the Alarm screen, displaying detailed configuration options like days of the week, ringtone, and vibration.
Dialog for adding or editing a label for an alarm, featuring a text input field and confirmation buttons.
Time picker dialog with numeric input fields for hour and minute, AM/PM selectors, and a button to switch to clock mode.
Time picker dialog with an analog clock face for hour and minute selection, AM/PM selectors, and a button to switch to numeric input mode.

checklist.label: Switch to text input mode button

nodes.summary: Alarm sound selection screen with tabs for 'Sounds' and 'YouTube Music', featuring lists of available device sounds and an option to add new sounds.
More options menu for Alarm sound selection, with options to hide music services or install streaming apps.
Date picker dialog for scheduling an alarm, featuring a calendar view, month/year navigation, and a button to switch to text input mode.
Clock screen displaying the current local time and date, with a floating action button to add world clocks and a bottom navigation bar.
City search screen with a search input field and a back button.
Timer screen with a numeric keypad (1-9, 00, 0) and backspace for setting a duration in hours, minutes, and seconds. Includes a bottom navigation bar.
Active timer screen showing the remaining time, a progress ring, and controls to pause or add time.
Paused timer screen showing the remaining time, a progress ring with a reset icon, and a 'Start' button.
Stopwatch screen featuring a large circular time display, a 'Start' button, and a bottom navigation bar.
Settings screen with 'Home time zone' now visible after enabling 'Automatic home clock'.
'Home time zone' selection dialog showing a scrollable list of GMT offsets and city names with radio buttons, and a 'Cancel' button.

checklist.label: W. Africa Time time zone option

nodes.summary: Active stopwatch screen with elapsed time display and controls for Reset, Pause, and Lap.
Paused stopwatch screen showing elapsed time, a list of laps, a 'Reset' button, and a 'Start' button.
Bedtime screen with sections for sleep schedule and sleep sounds. Includes bedtime and wake-up time settings, and controls for sleep sounds.
'More options' menu on the Bedtime screen containing settings for recent activity, sleep sounds, and upcoming events, along with standard options like Settings and Privacy policy.
Bedtime screen with an additional card for 'See recent bedtime activity' containing 'No thanks' and 'Continue' buttons.
Bedtime configuration bottom sheet with time selection, day of week toggles, reminder notification options, and bedtime mode settings.
Bedtime configuration bottom sheet with the schedule toggled off. Sub-settings for reminders and bedtime mode are hidden.
Reminder notification dialog with radio button options for notification timing before bedtime and a Cancel button.
Bedtime mode settings screen with options to trigger based on schedule or charging, and various screen and notification filters.

checklist.label: While charging at bedtime radio button
Turn off Bedtime mode at next alarm toggle

nodes.summary: More options menu for Bedtime mode, providing links for feedback, data management, and legal information.
Expanded Bedtime mode settings screen with specific schedule options including start/end times and day selection.

checklist.label: Turn on while charging radio button
Turn off Bedtime mode at next alarm toggle

nodes.summary: Bedtime mode settings screen with 'Turn on while charging' selected. Shows 'After' and 'Before' time range selectors instead of day toggles.

checklist.label: Turn off Bedtime mode at next alarm toggle

nodes.summary: Bedtime mode settings screen with 'None' selected in the expanded Bedtime routine section. Includes 'Turn on now' button and 'Customize in Modes' section.

checklist.label: Turn on while charging radio button
Turn off Bedtime mode at next alarm toggle

nodes.summary: Collapsed Bedtime mode settings screen, showing the current routine status as 'None' and providing access to system mode customization.
Manage your data screen in Digital Wellbeing, featuring toggles for device usage, bedtime sensor data, time zone history, and clock app data access.
More options menu on the Manage your data screen, containing a 'Send feedback' link.
Confirmation dialog asking to 'Turn off usage access?' for Digital Wellbeing data, with Cancel and Turn off in Settings options.
Confirmation dialog asking to 'Turn off access to sensor data?', with Cancel and Turn off buttons.
Confirmation dialog asking 'Turn off access to time zone history?', with 'Cancel' and 'Turn off' buttons.
Bedtime mode screen when active, showing 'Turn off for now' and 'Pause for 30 min' buttons with a dark theme.

Active Bedtime mode screen with the Bedtime routine card expanded. Displays 'Turn off for now' and 'Pause for 30 min' buttons, and routine configuration options (schedule, times, days) under a dark theme.
Bedtime mode screen when paused. It shows 'Add 30 min' and 'Resume now' buttons within a card indicating when it will resume. The Bedtime routine section is expanded below.
Bedtime mode screen when paused, showing 'Add 30 min' and 'Resume now' buttons. The Bedtime routine section is collapsed.
Bedtime mode screen when paused, with 'Turn on while charging' routine selected. Shows 'Add 30 min' and 'Resume now' buttons. Routine section includes 'After' and 'Before' time selectors.
Time picker dialog for setting the 'Before' time in Bedtime mode routine.

Active Bedtime mode screen with 'Turn on while charging' selected in the expanded Bedtime routine section. Features 'Turn off for now' and 'Pause for 30 min' buttons, and 'After' and 'Before' time range selectors.
Wake-up configuration bottom sheet with time selection, alarm toggle, and day of week selection.
Expanded Wake-up configuration bottom sheet with alarm enabled, showing additional options for Sunrise Alarm, Sound, Vibrate, and Google Assistant Routine.
Alarm sound selection screen for the Bedtime wake-up alarm, featuring a list of device sounds and an 'Add new' option. No tabs for music services are present.
More options menu for the Bedtime alarm sound selection screen, featuring options to show music services or install streaming apps.
Alarm sound selection screen for the Bedtime wake-up alarm, now showing both 'Sounds' and 'YouTube Music' tabs. The 'YouTube Music' tab is currently active, displaying a login prompt.
More options menu for the Bedtime alarm sound selection screen, showing options to hide the music tab or install other music apps.

edges.action: Tapped 'Switch to text input mode button'
Tapped 'More options' on Alarm sound screen
Tapped 'Show recent activity' from More options menu
Tapped 'No thanks' on recent activity card
Tapped '11:00 PM — Bedtime 11:00 PM' to configure bedtime
Tapped 'More options' on Bedtime mode screen
Tapped 'More options' on Manage your data screen
